title: FAMILY LAW SERVICES - 211info
text: ST ANDREW LEGAL CLINIC PORTLAND FAMILY LAW SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal representation and advice for people with family law problems such as adoption, child custody and support, divorce, paternity, and visitation issues. 2950 SE Stark Street Suite 200 Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 281-1500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 281-1500 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website to email form for appointment FEES: $50 consultation, then sliding-scale DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties Services: Comprehensive Family Law Services Guardianship Assistance Wage Assignment Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST ANDREW LEGAL CLINIC PORTLAND
